        CheckManager(managerAndroid, "Android", result);
        CheckManager(managerStandalone, "Standalone", result);
    }

    void CheckManager(XRManagerSettings manager, string platform, ExecutionResult result)
    {
        if (manager == null)
        {
            result.LogWarning("{0} manager is null", platform);
            return;

        var loaders = manager.activeLoaders;

            }
        }
    }

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "2171f83b-e878-4a05-9d4d-2319fdf8d71a", "args": {"title": "Thorough XR Settings Check", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEngine.XR.Management;
using UnityEditor.XR.Management;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string path = "Assets/XR/XRGeneralSettingsPerBuildTarget.asset";
        XRGeneralSettingsPerBuildTarget settings = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<XRGeneralSettingsPerBuildTarget>(path);
        
        if (settings == null)
        {
            result.LogError("Could not load XRGeneralSettingsPerBuildTarget at {0}", path);
            return;
        }

        result.Log("Inspecting {0}", path);
        
        BuildTargetGroup[] targets = { BuildTargetGroup.Android, BuildTargetGroup.Standalone };
        foreach (var target in targets)
        {
            XRGeneralSettings generalSettings = settings.SettingsForBuildTarget(target);
            if (generalSettings == null)
            {
                result.LogWarning("General Settings for {0} is null", target);
                continue;
            }

            result.Log("--- {0} ---", target);
            CheckForMissingScript(generalSettings, result);

            XRManagerSettings manager = generalSettings.Manager;
            if (manager == null)
            {
                result.LogWarning("Manager for {0} is null", target);
                continue;
            }

            CheckForMissingScript(manager, result);
            CheckManagerLoaders(manager, result);
        }
    }

    void CheckForMissingScript(Object obj, ExecutionResult result)
    {
        SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(obj);
        SerializedProperty scriptProp = so.FindProperty("m_Script");
        if (scriptProp != null && scriptProp.objectReferenceValue == null)
        {
            result.LogError("Object {0} ({1}) has a MISSING SCRIPT!", obj.name, obj.GetType().Name);
        }
    }

    void CheckManagerLoaders(XRManagerSettings manager, ExecutionResult result)
    {
        SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(manager);
        SerializedProperty loaders = so.FindProperty("m_Loaders");
        if (loaders != null)
        {
            for (int i = 0; i < loaders.arraySize; i++)
            {
                var prop = loaders.GetArrayElementAtIndex(i);
                if (prop.objectReferenceValue == null)
                {
                    result.LogError("Manager {0} has a MISSING LOADER at index {1}!", manager.name, i);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "f81a168c-79b6-43f2-a4f9-784e1fcebe6d", "args": {"title": "Fix TMP Warning in Scene", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;
using TMPro;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        var scene = EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath, OpenSceneMode.Additive);
        
        var texts = Object.FindObjectsByType<TMP_Text>(FindObjectsSortMode.None);
        foreach (var text in texts)
        {
            if (text.text.Contains("\U0001F4CC") || text.text.Contains("📌"))
            {
                result.Log("Found 📌 in GameObject: {0}", GetGameObjectPath(text.gameObject));
                result.RegisterObjectModification(text);
                text.text = text.text.Replace("📌", "[Pin]");
                result.Log("Replaced with '[Pin]'");
            }
        }
        
        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene);
        EditorSceneManager.CloseScene(scene, true);
    }

    string GetGameObjectPath(GameObject obj)
    {
        string path = obj.name;
        while (obj.transform.parent != null)
        {
            obj = obj.transform.parent.gameObject;
            path = obj.name + "/" + path;
        }
        return path;
    }
}"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.XR.OpenXR.Features;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        // Check OpenXR Features for Android (since target platform is Android)
        var featureSets = OpenXRFeatureSetManager.FeatureSetsForBuildTarget(BuildTargetGroup.Android);
        foreach (var fs in featureSets)
        {
            result.Log("FeatureSet: {0} ({1}) - Enabled: {2}", fs.name, fs.featureSetId, fs.isEnabled);
        }

        var features = OpenXRSettings.Instance.GetFeatures<OpenXRFeature>();
        foreach (var f in features)
        {
            result.Log("Feature: {0} - Enabled: {1}", f.name, f.enabled);
            if (f.name.Contains("Hand") || f.name.Contains("Tracking"))
            {
                if (!f.enabled)
                {
                    result.LogWarning("Found disabled Hand Tracking feature: {0}. Enabling it...", f.name);
                    result.RegisterObjectModification(f);
                    f.enabled = true;
                }
            }
        }
    }
}"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

using UnityEngine.XR.Management;
using UnityEditor.XR.Management;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string path = "Assets/XR/XRGeneralSettingsPerBuildTarget.asset";
        XRGeneralSettingsPerBuildTarget settings = AssetDatabase.LoadAssetAtPath<XRGeneralSettingsPerBuildTarget>(path);

        if (androidSettings != null && androidSettings.Manager != null)

            bool hasOpenXR = false;
            foreach (var loader in loaders)

                    break;

            if (!hasOpenXR)

                result.LogWarning("OpenXR loader is NOT active for Android. This might be why hand tracking is missing.");
            }
            else

                result.Log("OpenXR loader is active for Android.");
            }
        }
    }

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "93401393-992d-4234-8109-a102c5a3d71f", "args": {"title": "Enable Hand Tracking via Reflection", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using System;
using System.Collections;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Reflection;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        Type settingsType = Type.GetType("UnityEngine.XR.OpenXR.OpenXRSettings, Unity.XR.OpenXR");
        if (settingsType == null)
        {
            result.LogError("Could not find OpenXRSettings type.");
            return;
        }

        PropertyInfo instanceProp = settingsType.GetProperty("Instance", BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Static);
        object instance = instanceProp.GetValue(null);
        if (instance == null)
        {
            result.LogError("OpenXRSettings.Instance is null.");
            return;
        }

        MethodInfo getFeaturesMethod = settingsType.GetMethod("GetFeatures", new Type[] { typeof(Type) });
        Type featureType = Type.GetType("UnityEngine.XR.OpenXR.Features.OpenXRFeature, Unity.XR.OpenXR");
        
        IEnumerable features = (IEnumerable)getFeaturesMethod.Invoke(instance, new object[] { featureType });
        
        bool foundHandTracking = false;
        foreach (object feature in features)
        {
            PropertyInfo nameProp = featureType.GetProperty("name", BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Instance);
            string name = (string)nameProp.GetValue(feature);
            
            PropertyInfo enabledProp = featureType.GetProperty("enabled", BindingFlags.Public | BindingFlags.Instance);
            bool enabled = (bool)enabledProp.GetValue(feature);

            result.Log("Feature: {0} (Enabled: {1})", name, enabled);

            if (name.Contains("Hand Tracking"))
            {
                foundHandTracking = true;
                if (!enabled)
                {
                    result.LogWarning("Enabling Hand Tracking feature...");
                    result.RegisterObjectModification((UnityEngine.Object)feature);
                    enabledProp.SetValue(feature, true);
                    result.Log("Hand Tracking enabled.");
                }
            }
        }

        if (!foundHandTracking)
        {
            result.LogWarning("Hand Tracking feature not found in the list.");
        }
    }
}"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "f343b948-426b-4942-8f3a-7620e90700e0", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string[] allAssetPaths = AssetDatabase.GetAllAssetPaths();
        int missingCount = 0;

        foreach (string path in allAssetPaths)
        {
            if (!path.StartsWith("Assets/")) continue;
            
            Object[] subAssets = AssetDatabase.LoadAllAssetsAtPath(path);
            foreach (var asset in subAssets)
            {
                if (asset == null) continue;

                SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(asset);
                SerializedProperty scriptProp = so.FindProperty("m_Script");
                if (scriptProp != null && scriptProp.objectReferenceValue == null)
                {
                    // Check if it's a MonoBehaviour or ScriptableObject that *should* have a script
                    if (asset is MonoBehaviour || asset is ScriptableObject)
                    {
                        result.LogError("Missing script on asset: {0} (Path: {1}, Type: {2})", asset.name, path, asset.GetType().Name);
                        missingCount++;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        result.Log("Finished checking. Total missing scripts found: {0}", missingCount);
    }
}", "title": "Check All Assets for Missing Scripts"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "da43e08e-9b3c-4cf4-ac81-99fc493bc050", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string path = "Assets/XR/Settings/OpenXR Package Settings.asset";
        Object[] subAssets = AssetDatabase.LoadAllAssetsAtPath(path);
        
        foreach (var asset in subAssets)
        {
            if (asset == null) continue;
            
            result.Log("Asset: {0} ({1})", asset.name, asset.GetType().Name);
            SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(asset);
            SerializedProperty enabledProp = so.FindProperty("m_enabled");
            if (enabledProp != null)
            {
                result.Log(" - Enabled: {0}", enabledProp.boolValue);
                if (asset.name.Contains("Hand") || asset.name.Contains("Tracking"))
                {
                    if (!enabledProp.boolValue)
                    {
                        result.LogWarning("Found disabled Hand Tracking feature. Enabling...");
                        result.RegisterObjectModification(asset);
                        enabledProp.boolValue = true;
                        so.ApplyModifiedProperties();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}", "title": "Inspect OpenXR Package Settings Sub-assets"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

using UnityEditor;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string path = "Assets/XR/Settings/OpenXR Package Settings.asset";
        Object[] subAssets = AssetDatabase.LoadAllAssetsAtPath(path);

        {

            // Check features for Standalone
            if (asset.name.EndsWith(" Standalone"))
            {
                SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(asset);

                    if (asset.name.Contains("Hand Tracking") || asset.name.Contains("Hand Interaction"))
                    {
                        result.LogWarning("Enabling Standalone feature: {0}", asset.name);
                        result.RegisterObjectModification(asset);

                        so.ApplyModifiedProperties();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "7ceaa16b-f722-45b9-a6d0-4a44cf97b794", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/SampleScene.unity";
        var scene = EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath, OpenSceneMode.Additive);
        
        GameObject[] allObjects = Object.FindObjectsByType<GameObject>(FindObjectsSortMode.None);
        foreach (var obj in allObjects)
        {
            int removed = GameObjectUtility.RemoveMonoBehavioursWithMissingScript(obj);
            if (removed > 0)
            {
                result.Log("Removed {0} missing scripts from {1}", removed, GetGameObjectPath(obj));
                result.RegisterObjectModification(obj);
            }
        }
        
        EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene);
        EditorSceneManager.CloseScene(scene, true);
    }

    string GetGameObjectPath(GameObject obj)
    {
        string path = obj.name;
        while (obj.transform.parent != null)
        {
            obj = obj.transform.parent.gameObject;
            path = obj.name + "/" + path;
        }
        return path;
    }
}", "title": "Remove Missing Scripts in SampleScene"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

payload.markdown:
<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Refining the Replacement Strategy**

Okay, the root cause is clearer: my find-and-replace operation on the text field failed. I confirmed the presence of the problematic character, 📌, and saw the error log, "STILL FOUND." My initial approach, using `EditPrefabContentsScope`, seems sound, yet it didn't eliminate the character. I'm suspecting some conflicting logic or events. Let's try to manipulate `SerializedProperty` within the prefab scope, targeting the `m_text` property directly, which may bypass problematic validation.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "f2009ec2-01d3-4918-8b89-2217eccb2b42", "args": {"title": "Fix 📌 in Prefabs via SerializedProperty", "code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using TMPro;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string[] paths = {
            "Assets/Prefabs/VRUI/QuizPopupWindow.prefab",
            "Assets/Prefabs/VRUI/SlidePopupWindow.prefab"
        };

        foreach (string path in paths)
        {
            using (var editingScope = new PrefabUtility.EditPrefabContentsScope(path))
            {
                GameObject root = editingScope.prefabContentsRoot;
                TMP_Text[] texts = root.GetComponentsInChildren<TMP_Text>(true);
                foreach (var text in texts)
                {
                    if (text != null && text.text != null && text.text.Contains("\U0001F4CC"))
                    {
                        result.Log("Fixing {0} in {1}", text.name, path);
                        SerializedObject so = new SerializedObject(text);
                        SerializedProperty textProp = so.FindProperty("m_text");
                        if (textProp != null)
                        {
                            textProp.stringValue = textProp.stringValue.Replace("\U0001F4CC", "[Pin]");
                            so.ApplyModifiedProperties();
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            result.Log("Finished processing {0}", path);
        }
    }
}"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<THOUGHT>{"content": "**Concluding the Cleanup**

I've finally ironed out the scripts. My next step involves a final, meticulous pass over the prefabs. I want to ensure no stray characters remain, as these could cause problems after the script execution. Fingers crossed, this final polish will result in a clean, error-free product.


", "agent": "CoreAgent"}</THOUGHT>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "61db4826-1cdc-4ea0-8768-bff9bc27d6a6", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using TMPro;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string[] paths = {
            "Assets/Prefabs/VRUI/QuizPopupWindow.prefab",
            "Assets/Prefabs/VRUI/SlidePopupWindow.prefab"
        };

        foreach (string path in paths)
        {
            using (var editingScope = new PrefabUtility.EditPrefabContentsScope(path))
            {
                GameObject root = editingScope.prefabContentsRoot;
                TMP_Text[] texts = root.GetComponentsInChildren<TMP_Text>(true);
                foreach (var text in texts)
                {
                    if (text != null && text.text != null && text.text.Contains("\U0001F4CC"))
                    {
                        text.text = text.text.Replace("\U0001F4CC", "[Pin]");
                        EditorUtility.SetDirty(text);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        result.Log("Final prefab cleanup complete.");
    }
}", "title": "Final Prefab Cleanup after Script Fixes"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>

<TOOL_CALL>{"tool_id": "Unity.RunCommand", "call_id": "6a952078-92fd-4aaf-8e26-1ae6f4d22c0f", "args": {"code": "using UnityEngine;
using UnityEditor;
using UnityEditor.SceneManagement;
using TMPro;

internal class CommandScript : IRunCommand
{
    public void Execute(ExecutionResult result)
    {
        string scenePath = "Assets/Scenes/VRCourseSelection.unity";
        var scene = EditorSceneManager.OpenScene(scenePath, OpenSceneMode.Additive);
        
        var texts = Object.FindObjectsByType<TMP_Text>(FindObjectsSortMode.None);
        int foundCount = 0;
        foreach (var text in texts)
        {
            if (text.text.Contains("\U0001F4CC") || text.text.Contains("📌"))
            {
                result.Log("STILL FOUND 📌 in Scene GameObject: {0}", text.gameObject.name);
                text.text = text.text.Replace("📌", "[Pin]");
                EditorUtility.SetDirty(text);
                foundCount++;
            }
        }
        
        if (foundCount > 0)
        {
            EditorSceneManager.SaveScene(scene);
            result.Log("Fixed {0} instances in scene.", foundCount);
        }
        else
        {
            result.Log("No 📌 found in scene.");
        }
        
        EditorSceneManager.CloseScene(scene, true);
    }
}", "title": "Check Scene for 📌 one last time"}, "agent": "CoreAgent"}</TOOL_CALL>
